0.$description: Darkest extreme. Pure black for neutral; deepest tint for hues.

10.$description: Near-dark. Avoids OLED banding from absolute #000.

25.$description: Deep. Text high-emphasis on light surfaces.

50.$description: Strong. Body text on light; solid idle on bright themes.

75.$description: Mid-dark. Border strong on light; solid idle.

100.$description: Midpoint. Placeholder text, disabled controls, max-chroma color.

125.$description: Mid-light. Interactive hover on dark themes.

150.$description: Light. Raised surface on bright themes; solid idle on dark themes.

175.$description: Very light. Base surface on light themes; body text on dark themes.

200.$description: Lightest extreme. Pure white for neutral; palest tint for hues.

0.$description: Darkest extreme. Pure black for neutral; deepest tint for hues.

20.$description: 8px. Snug gap. Inner padding of small controls.

40.$description: 16px. One rem. Typography base; default body padding.

55.$description: 22px. Reserved for fine-grained tuning between 50 and 60.

240.$description: 96px. Pill radius (always larger than tallest pill control).

004.$description: 4%. Faintest tint — cell hover on dense surfaces.

008.$description: 8%. Subtle tint — `:hover` mix amount on filled buttons.

10.$description: 12px. Caption: metadata, legal text, table headers.

20.$description: 14px. Small body: secondary copy, dense UI, inputs.

10.$description: Tight. Display typography, uppercase, monospace blocks.
